theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Adapted for 'Sombre et Simple')
theme_and_archetype.core_vibe: Minimalist, tactical, high-contrast, data-heavy but scannable. Elite athletic command center.

rules: No generic sans (Inter, Roboto) for headings.
Headlines > 32px MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Use JetBrains Mono for stats, scores, ELO numbers, and data tables to ensure tabular alignment.
The jump between a heading and its subheading must not exceed 2 Tailwind steps.
Never use pure black #000000; use #0A0A0A (Deep Obsidian).
Limit the use of the primary Volt Green (#CCFF00) to key CTAs, active states, and winning statistics.
Ensure text meets APCA standards against backgrounds.
Hover states MUST explicitly set text color (e.g., hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-white).

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard, but lean into generous spacing (p-6, p-8) for empty areas and tight spacing (gap-4) for data clusters.
rules: Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6) to prevent text collision.
Every page MUST have a visible navigation bar on desktop.
Grid items MUST be direct children of grid containers.

buttons.primary: bg-[#CCFF00] text-[#0A0A0A] font-bold rounded-md px-6 py-2 hover:bg-[#B3E600] active:scale-95 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#222222] text-white hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] px-6 py-2 rounded-md transition-all

shadcn_overrides: Customize borders to be sharp or max 6px radius.
Remove default soft shadows from Shadcn cards.
Use Shadcn tables but make rows border-b border-[#222222] and hover:bg-[#1A1A1A].
Use Phosphor icons (@phosphor-icons/react) instead of Lucide.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All interactive elements must have hover and active states.
motion_and_interaction.charts: Recharts should have animation duration of 500ms.

media_and_images.instructions_to_main_agent: Use these exact URLs for backgrounds, heroes, and empty states. Do NOT use placeholder URLs.

login_hero_bg.description: Soccer field at night under stadium lights. Use as the background for the Google Login screen with a heavy bg-black/70 overlay to ensure login button pops.

dashboard_tactical_bg.description: Minimalist 5v5 tactical pitch grid. Use in the 'Balanced Team Generator' section or behind key data visualization empty states. Must be very low opacity (opacity-20) blended into the black background.

abstract_analytics_bg.description: Abstract sports data numbers. Can be used for empty states on player profile pages or general decorative backgrounds.

pages_and_features_instructions.global_testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="login-btn"`).
pages_and_features_instructions.authentication: Full-screen dark layout. The `login_hero_bg` image covers the viewport. Heavy dark overlay (bg-black/80). Center a glassmorphic card for the Google Login button.
pages_and_features_instructions.dashboard_page: Implement 'Control Room' bento grid. Top row: Global Stats (Total Matches, Active Players) using large JetBrains Mono numbers. Middle row: Top 10 Rankings tables (Win Rate, ELO). Bottom row: Last 20 Matches feed.
pages_and_features_instructions.player_management: Use a clean Shadcn table. Columns: Player Name, Matches Played, Wins, Draws, Losses, Win%, Goals, ELO. Stick to tabular numeric alignment.
pages_and_features_instructions.match_entry: Split layout. Left: Team A composition. Right: Team B composition. Bottom: Score inputs and Submit. Use Phosphor Icons for player addition.
pages_and_features_instructions.team_generator: Use `dashboard_tactical_bg` as a subtle watermark background. Two columns: Available Players (Checkbox list) -> Most Balanced Teams Output. Show the balance percentage in Volt Green (#CCFF00) if >90%.
pages_and_features_instructions.player_profile: Top section: Summary Stats (large numbers). Main content: Recharts line chart showing ELO over time. Use #007AFF for the ELO line chart, minimal grid lines, tooltip on hover.
